task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Contract Template' document in the 'Templates' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the 'Templates' workspace and the agent clicking on or viewing the 'Contract Template' document.

task_completion.description: Open the edit or replace file dialog for the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the 'Edit' tab, 'Replace' file dialog, or file upload interface for the 'Contract Template' document.

task_completion.description: Select and upload the new file 'Q3_Status_Report.pdf'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog showing navigation to '/home/ga/nuxeo/data/' and selection of 'Q3_Status_Report.pdf', or the file upload field displaying 'Q3_Status_Report.pdf' as the staged file.

task_completion.description: Ensure the document title remains 'Contract Template'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the edit form clearly shows 'Contract Template' without any alterations.

task_completion.description: Ensure the existing description is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field in the edit form clearly shows the original text 'Standard service agreement template v1.0' without any alterations.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the new file is attached.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final document view screen shows the changes have been saved, and 'Q3_Status_Report.pdf' is listed as the main file attachment instead of the original file.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nuxeo web GUI (browser window, clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than using terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent used the system file picker to upload the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OS-level file selection dialog being used to pick the PDF, rather than just typing a path into a non-upload text field.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal window is either not used or only used for basic navigation/verification, not for executing scripts that directly modify the Nuxeo database or file system to complete the task.
